title: EPD Header Metadata
description: Phase 2 output: header-level metadata from an EN 15804 EPD PDF

epd_number.description: The official EPD declaration number, e.g. 'S-P-12345' or 'EPD-BBD-20230001-IBE1-EN'

program_operator.description: The EPD program operator, e.g. 'BE-BD', 'EPD International', 'IBU', 'INIES'

address.description: Full address as a single string if present

product_name.description: The declared product name as it appears on the EPD cover (main title)

product_description.description: Product type or subtitle on the cover below the main name, e.g. 'fibre cement sheets'

standards_conformity.description: Verbatim conformity statement from the cover, e.g. 'Conform to EN 15804+A2, NBN/DTD B08-001 and ISO 14025'

verification_statement.description: Verbatim verification badge text from the cover, e.g. 'Third party verified' or 'THIRD PARTY VERIFIED'

conformity_basis.description: Secondary conformity line under the verification badge, e.g. 'in accordance with EN 15804+A2 and B-EPD-PCR'

declared_scope.description: Verbatim declared unit + product scope line from the cover, e.g. '1 m² Rockfit Mono insulation for cavity walls, curtain walls and separating walls.'

items.description: Lifecycle module code marked as declared on the cover, e.g. A1, A2, A3, A4, A5, B2, B4, C, D

declared_modules.description: EN 15804 lifecycle modules declared on the cover (MODULES DECLARED section)

value.description: Numeric value of the declared unit, e.g. 1

pcr_reference.description: Full PCR title from the cover, e.g. 'EN 16783, Thermal insulation products – Product category rules (PCR) for factory made and in-situ formed'

type.description: Verification type as defined in EN 15804
